humanSummary.text: Final audit found no P0/P1 blockers for UNIV-010. The remaining scale-smoke CI gate gap is tracked as a non-blocking P2 DAG follow-up.

findings.title: Scale smoke harness is not wired into a CI-safe required target
findings.description: The scale smoke harness is documented as a required local/performance gate, but just ci does not run it and there is not yet a separate CI-safe required smoke target.

evidence.detail: Final wave 12 audit recorded CI-safe scale smoke wiring as a P2 follow-up with no P0/P1 completion blocker.

findings.impact: A required performance smoke can be skipped accidentally because the documented gate is not represented by a CI-safe job or separate required target.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: The scale smoke harness runs under a CI-safe Itotori DB job or a separate required smoke target documented next to just ci.
When DATABASE_URL is unset, the smoke target skips or fails with an explicit diagnostic that matches the DB recipe policy.
The chosen target is documented as the durable required gate for scale-smoke verification.

acceptanceCriteria: The scale smoke harness runs under a CI-safe Itotori DB job or a separate required smoke target documented next to just ci
When DATABASE_URL is unset, the smoke target skips or fails with an explicit diagnostic that matches the DB recipe policy
The chosen target is documented as the durable required gate for scale-smoke verification
auditFocus: Required scale smoke docs without a runnable CI-safe target
DATABASE_URL unset behavior that hides skipped scale coverage
Scale performance gates drifting away from just ci documentation
existingDagNodeUpdate.notes: Tracked in planned DAG node UNIV-013 for wave 12 completion bookkeeping.
